Weapon

Damage type50% Kinetic + 50% Energy
Per hit144
Shot total432per hit x hit count
Approx. DPS270shot total + DoT / reload
Heat per sec113
Hits per shot3

  • Fast missiles
  • Disables shield regen

Elite Tech Branches

BranchKeyLevel 1 valueLevel 100 valueMeaning
Energy Burn 10 SecondsAddEnergyBurn4400Adds 400% total DoT over 10 seconds at level 100.
Corrosive Burn 10 SecondsAddCorrosiveBurn5500Adds 500% total DoT over 10 seconds at level 100.
Extra ProjectilesAddExtraProjectiles0.550Changes projectile count and redistributes damage per projectile.
Improved Direct DamageIncreaseDirectDamage0.55050% effect at level 100.
Improved RangeIncreaseRange1100100% effect at level 100.
Improved Attack SpeedIncreaseRefire0.44040% effect at level 100.
Improved Velocity and GuidanceIncreaseGuidance2200200% effect at level 100.
Reduced Power CostReducePowerCost0.252525% effect at level 100.

Tech Levels

LevelDescriptionProjectilePrimary MaterialSecondary Material
1Increase rate of fire by 20%. Increase speed by 10%.Homing Nezerian Hunter missileSteel x400n/a
2Increase damage by 25%. Improves guidance.Homing Nezerian Hunter missileSteel x800n/a
3Increase damage by 12%. Increase debuff duration by 4 sec. One additional Missile.Homing Nezerian Hunter missileSteel x1600n/a
4Increase range by 20%. Improves guidance. Homing Nezerian Hunter missileSteel x3200Hydrogen Crystal x800
5Increase damage by 33%. Reduce power consumption by 10%.Homing Nezerian Hunter missileSteel x6400Plasma Fluids x200
6Increase range by 20%. Increase speed by 10%. Increase debuff duration by 4 sec. Improve guidance. One additional Missile.Homing Nezerian Hunter missileSteel x12800Iridium x800
